# clo_project_recipes (Data Source)

Fetches the list of recipes available in the project

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_project_recipes" "all" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns recipes

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `available_licenses` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--result--available_licenses))
- `id` (String)
- `min_disk` (Number)
- `min_ram` (Number)
- `min_vcpus` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `suitable_images` (List of String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--result--available_licenses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.available_licenses`

Read-Only:

- `addon` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `required` (Boolean)
